parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.first().json ?? {};
const sqlLiteral = (value) => "'" + String(value ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'";
const values = input.names.map((name, index) => `(${index + 1}, ${sqlLiteral(name)})`).join(',\n    ');
const sql = `
WITH input_names(input_order, input_name) AS (
  VALUES
    ${values}
), matched_member_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    i.input_order,
    i.input_name,
    rm.id AS member_raw_id,
    trim(concat_ws(' ', rm."First name", rm."Last name")) AS member_name,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."First name"), '') AS member_first_name,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Last name"), '') AS member_last_name,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Email address"), '') AS member_email,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Start Date"), '') AS member_start_date,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Expiry Date"), '') AS member_expiry_date,
    rm."Cost" AS member_cost,
    rm."Paid" AS member_paid,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Gift aid"), '') AS member_gift_aid,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Gender"), '') AS member_gender,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Date of birth"), '') AS member_birth_date,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Phone number"), '') AS member_home_number,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Work number"), '') AS member_work_number,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Mobile number"), '') AS member_mobile_number,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Emergency phone number"), '') AS member_emergency_phone_number,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Postcode"), '') AS member_postcode,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Address 1"), '') AS member_address_1,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Address 2"), '') AS member_address_2,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Address 3"), '') AS member_address_3,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Town"), '') AS member_town,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."County"), '') AS member_county,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Country"), '') AS member_country,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Occupation"), '') AS member_occupation,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Date joined venue"), '') AS member_date_joined_venue,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Medical history"), '') AS member_medical_history,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(trim(rm."Contact source"), ''), NULLIF(trim(rm."Venue source"), ''), NULLIF(trim(rm." Venue source"), '')) AS member_source,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Key pin number"), '') AS member_key_pin_number,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Tags provided"), '') AS member_tags_provided,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Membership"), '') AS membership,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Status"), '') AS member_status,
    NULLIF(trim(rm."Payment"), '') AS member_payment_status,
    row_number() OVER (
      PARTITION BY i.input_order
      ORDER BY COALESCE(NULLIF(substring(rm."Membership" from '(20[0-9]{2})'), ''), '0')::int DESC, rm.id DESC
    ) AS match_rank
  FROM input_names i
  JOIN public.raw_members rm
    ON COALESCE(rm.is_current, true) = true
   AND lower(trim(concat_ws(' ', rm."First name", rm."Last name"))) = lower(i.input_name)
), matched_members AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM matched_member_candidates
  WHERE match_rank = 1
), resolved_members AS (
  SELECT
    mm.*,
    mr.contact_id AS member_contact_row_id,
    NULLIF(trim(member_contact."Unique ID"), '') AS member_unique_id,
    mr.resolve_rule AS member_contact_resolve_rule,
    (pr.id IS NOT NULL) AS has_distinct_primary,
    pc.contact_id AS primary_contact_row_id,
    NULLIF(trim(primary_contact."Unique ID"), '') AS primary_unique_id,
    pc.resolve_rule AS primary_contact_resolve_rule,
    trim(concat_ws(' ', pr."First name", pr."Last name")) AS primary_name,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."First name"), '') AS primary_first_name,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Last name"), '') AS primary_last_name,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Email address"), '') AS primary_email,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Start Date"), '') AS primary_start_date,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Expiry Date"), '') AS primary_expiry_date,
    pr."Cost" AS primary_cost,
    pr."Paid" AS primary_paid,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Gift aid"), '') AS primary_gift_aid,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Gender"), '') AS primary_gender,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Date of birth"), '') AS primary_birth_date,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Phone number"), '') AS primary_home_number,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Work number"), '') AS primary_work_number,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Mobile number"), '') AS primary_mobile_number,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Emergency phone number"), '') AS primary_emergency_phone_number,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Postcode"), '') AS primary_postcode,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Address 1"), '') AS primary_address_1,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Address 2"), '') AS primary_address_2,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Address 3"), '') AS primary_address_3,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Town"), '') AS primary_town,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."County"), '') AS primary_county,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Country"), '') AS primary_country,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Occupation"), '') AS primary_occupation,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Date joined venue"), '') AS primary_date_joined_venue,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Medical history"), '') AS primary_medical_history,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(trim(pr."Contact source"), ''), NULLIF(trim(pr."Venue source"), ''), NULLIF(trim(pr." Venue source"), '')) AS primary_source,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Key pin number"), '') AS primary_key_pin_number,
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Tags provided"), '') AS primary_tags_provided
  FROM matched_members mm
  LEFT JOIN public.vw_junior_main_contacts j
    ON j.member_raw_id = mm.member_raw_id
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT mc.*
    FROM (
      SELECT mc.*, 0 AS match_priority, 0 AS season_gap
      FROM public.vw_raw_members_main_contacts_current mc
      WHERE j.main_contact_raw_id IS NOT NULL
        AND mc.id = j.main_contact_raw_id
      UNION ALL
      SELECT mc.*, 1 AS match_priority, 0 AS season_gap
      FROM public.vw_raw_members_main_contacts_current mc
      WHERE j.main_contact_raw_id IS NULL
        AND trim(concat_ws(' ', mc."First name", mc."Last name")) <> mm.member_name
        AND COALESCE(mc."Membership", '') = COALESCE(mm.membership, '')
        AND COALESCE(mc."Status", '') = COALESCE(mm.member_status, '')
        AND COALESCE(mc."Start Date", '') = COALESCE(mm.member_start_date, '')
        AND COALESCE(mc."Expiry Date", '') = COALESCE(mm.member_expiry_date, '')
        AND (
          COALESCE(mc."Payment", '') = COALESCE(mm.member_payment_status, '')
          OR (
            COALESCE(mm.member_payment_status, '') IN ('Part Paid', 'Paid')
            AND COALESCE(mc."Payment", '') IN ('Part Paid', 'Paid')
          )
        )
        AND (
          COALESCE(mc."Paid", -1::numeric) = COALESCE(mm.member_paid, -1::numeric)
          OR (
            COALESCE(mm.member_payment_status, '') IN ('Part Paid', 'Paid')
            AND COALESCE(mc."Payment", '') IN ('Part Paid', 'Paid')
          )
        )
        AND (
          (
            mm.member_last_name IS NOT NULL
            AND (
              public.normalize_match_text(mc."Last name") = public.normalize_match_text(mm.member_last_name)
              OR public.normalize_match_text(mm.member_last_name) LIKE '%' || public.normalize_match_text(mc."Last name") || '%'
              OR public.normalize_match_text(mc."Last name") LIKE '%' || public.normalize_match_text(mm.member_last_name) || '%'
            )
          )
          OR (mm.member_postcode IS NOT NULL AND public.normalize_match_text(mc."Postcode") = public.normalize_match_text(mm.member_postcode))
          OR (mm.member_address_1 IS NOT NULL AND public.normalize_match_text(mc."Address 1") = public.normalize_match_text(mm.member_address_1))
        )
      UNION ALL
      SELECT
        mc.*,
        2 AS match_priority,
        ABS(
          COALESCE(NULLIF(substring(mc."Membership" from '(20[0-9]{2})'), ''), '0')::int
          - COALESCE(NULLIF(substring(mm.membership from '(20[0-9]{2})'), ''), '0')::int
        ) AS season_gap
      FROM public.raw_members_main_contacts mc
      WHERE j.main_contact_raw_id IS NULL
        AND COALESCE(mc.is_current, true) = true
        AND trim(concat_ws(' ', mc."First name", mc."Last name")) <> mm.member_name
        AND COALESCE(mc."Status", '') = COALESCE(mm.member_status, '')
        AND (
          COALESCE(mc."Payment", '') = COALESCE(mm.member_payment_status, '')
          OR (
            COALESCE(mm.member_payment_status, '') IN ('Part Paid', 'Paid')
            AND COALESCE(mc."Payment", '') IN ('Part Paid', 'Paid')
          )
        )
        AND (
          (
            mm.member_last_name IS NOT NULL
            AND (
              public.normalize_match_text(mc."Last name") = public.normalize_match_text(mm.member_last_name)
              OR public.normalize_match_text(mm.member_last_name) LIKE '%' || public.normalize_match_text(mc."Last name") || '%'
              OR public.normalize_match_text(mc."Last name") LIKE '%' || public.normalize_match_text(mm.member_last_name) || '%'
            )
          )
          OR (mm.member_postcode IS NOT NULL AND public.normalize_match_text(mc."Postcode") = public.normalize_match_text(mm.member_postcode))
          OR (mm.member_address_1 IS NOT NULL AND public.normalize_match_text(mc."Address 1") = public.normalize_match_text(mm.member_address_1))
        )
    ) mc
    ORDER BY
      mc.match_priority,
      mc.season_gap,
      CASE WHEN NULLIF(trim(mc."Email address"), '') IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
      CASE WHEN COALESCE(NULLIF(trim(mc."Mobile number"), ''), NULLIF(trim(mc."Phone number"), '')) IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
      mc.id DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) pr ON TRUE
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL resolve_best_contact_row(
    mm.member_name,
    mm.member_email,
    mm.member_last_name,
    false
  ) mr(contact_id, payer_name, first_name, last_name, email_address, phone_number, mobile_number, address_1, address_2, address_3, town, county, postcode, venue_id, member_status, resolve_rule, candidate_count) ON TRUE
  LEFT JOIN public.raw_contacts member_contact
    ON member_contact.id = mr.contact_id
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL resolve_best_contact_row(
    trim(concat_ws(' ', pr."First name", pr."Last name")),
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Email address"), ''),
    NULLIF(trim(pr."Last name"), ''),
    false
  ) pc(contact_id, payer_name, first_name, last_name, email_address, phone_number, mobile_number, address_1, address_2, address_3, town, county, postcode, venue_id, member_status, resolve_rule, candidate_count) ON pr.id IS NOT NULL
  LEFT JOIN public.raw_contacts primary_contact
    ON primary_contact.id = pc.contact_id
)
SELECT *
FROM resolved_members
ORDER BY input_order;`;
return [{ json: { ...input, sql } }];
